name: Wheelgun
description:
The Wheelgun handles like the standard version, aside from the usual rarity stat boost and its blue Jakobs finish.

Barrel effects (excluding accessory bonuses):
- Tediore: No stat change.
- Maliwan: Slight accuracy increase.
- Bandit: Higher damage, lower accuracy.
- Dahl: Better accuracy, reduced recoil and faster recoil recovery, but lower damage.
